note: Removed the legacy V11 hotfix banner ('⚡ SOST V11 UPDATE — ACTION REQUIRED BEFORE BLOCK 7,100'). Stale since the chain crossed 7,100 — its content was duplicated and contradicted by the v132 'HOW TO KNOW IF YOU NEED TO UPGRADE' callout at the top of the Phase 2 resumed banner, which carries the same upgrade procedure plus the post-fork incident context. The v11UpdatePulse keyframe is also removed. The toggleV11Banner / initV11Banner JS helpers stay (harmless, null-guarded) so any external pages embedding the old IDs do not break. MY MINER input + alerts feature unchanged: still surfaced inline in the config strip above the dashboard and self-explanatory via its placeholder text.
